title: Smoky Fennel Stew
description: A hearty stew with a smoky twist, featuring fennel and a blend of savory spices.
instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Add sliced fennel and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Stir in smoky paprika and cook for 1 minute.
5. Add Kenyan tomato puree and stew broth, and bring to a simmer.
6. Reduce heat to low and cook, covered, for 20 minutes.
7. Stir in heavy cream or coconut cream and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
